page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance 01
text:
is an artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 31 May 2011. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance.

Overview

Sixteen color pages are present in the release. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000105/
